name: read-this-later
title: Research Sync
description: Browse and read your saved articles, and save the current browser tab.
author: shearm

commands.name: list-unread
commands.title: Show Saved Links
commands.subtitle: Research Sync
commands.description: Browse your saved articles, read them, and open them in your browser

commands.name: save-current-tab
commands.title: Save Current Tab
commands.subtitle: Research Sync
commands.description: Save the URL of the frontmost browser tab to Research Sync

preferences.name: syncToken
preferences.title: Sync Token
preferences.description: Bearer token for the Research Sync service (the same token your browser extension and iOS app use).
